overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic elevated pedestrian corridor. The player ascends stairs, traverses teal-lit walkways with views of neon-lit streets below, and passes through cluttered commercial sections before descending at the end.

events.description: begins ascending concrete staircase from lower concourse level

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide concrete staircase with metal railings in a futuristic building interior

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward to upper level
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
tropical plants in wall-mounted planters adding greenery to the concrete interior

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell in a futuristic building. The player ascends the stairs, passing an NPC descending in the opposite direction. Teal fluorescent lighting illuminates the space, with tropical plants visible in wall planters on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian walkway with glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor passing other pedestrians and approaching window sections

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the player through the corridor

entered.detail: wide tiled walkway with teal painted walls and continuous overhead lighting
thick concrete support pillars lining the left side of the walkway
large glass windows offering views of the city outside

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the player enters a long enclosed walkway with teal walls and tiled flooring. The corridor features glass windows on the right side revealing distant neon lights. Other pedestrians walk ahead and pass by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: walkway overlook with view of neon-lit street

events.description: approaches large open windows revealing the neon-lit city street below

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly to observe the city view through the open window sections while continuing forward

entered.detail: large open window section without glass providing clear view of the street below
large circular red neon sign with 'VISTA' text mounted on a building facade
wet city street visible below with market stalls and neon lighting reflections

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up to reveal large windows overlooking the neon-lit city street below. A prominent red 'VISTA' neon sign is visible on a distant building, with palm trees and wet pavement reflecting the colorful lights. The player continues past this scenic overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered commercial corridor with vending machines

events.description: walkway becomes increasingly cluttered with debris, trash, and discarded cardboard

agents.ego_description: navigating through a debris-filled corridor past illuminated vending machines and advertisements

notable_agents.action: standing near the vending machines at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: row of automated vending machines with glowing screens and illuminated displays
scattered trash, cardboard boxes, and debris covering the floor tiles
large prominent vending machine with 'BIG' advertisement branding and colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the window overlook, the corridor becomes increasingly cluttered with trash and debris scattered across the floor. The player passes vending machines on the left, including a large unit with 'BIG' branding, while approaching an NPC standing near the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dim corridor with descending exit stairs

events.description: begins descending concrete staircase at the end of the corridor to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking down the final corridor section and descending stairs to exit the upper walkway

entered.detail: illuminated green exit sign mounted above a doorway at the corridor junction
concrete staircase leading downward to a lower level of the building
windows showing red neon lighting from the exterior cityscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a corridor with red-tinted lighting and a green exit sign visible on the left. The player passes the large vending machine on the left side before reaching a descending staircase at the end, proceeding down to a lower level as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic pedestrian corridor that transitions from a sterile, teal-lit ascent into a cluttered urban walkway and finally toward a red-tinted descent. It begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell, ascending past tropical wall planters and a descending pedestrian under cool fluorescent lighting. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens into a long enclosed walkway with tiled floors and glass windows that gradually reveal a sprawling neon city street and a prominent red VISTA sign reflecting off wet pavement. The environment then shifts from this scenic overlook into a more derelict section of the hall, where the floor becomes cluttered with debris and the camera passes large branded vending machines. Finally, the lighting transitions to a deep red hue as the camera passes a green exit sign and proceeds down a descending staircase to a lower level.
